opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right index finger looks like a hot swollen sausage, my left knee is full of fluid, and the throbbing pain is so bad it's keeping me awake all night. I can barely use my hand or put any weight on that leg.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all blew up over the last day and it's excruciating — someone told me a hot swollen joint like this needs to be checked urgently in case it's a joint infection, so I wanted to get it looked at.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on fast over about the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day and getting worse, kept me awake all night with the throbbing
symptom_narrative.character: the whole index finger is uniformly puffed up like a sausage and I can't bend it at all; the knee is swollen and tight and full of fluid, warm and very sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating — the worst joint pain I've had; I can't move the finger or bear weight on the leg
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right index finger (the whole finger, not just one knuckle) and the left knee — two separate places on opposite sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant throbbing, worse when I try to move the joints or stand on the leg
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: ice packs and keeping still help a little; I've been resting them
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement of the finger or putting weight on the knee
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've felt really wiped out and tired for a while before the joints flared, and I feel a bit warm/feverish but not shivering; I've noticed the nails on that hand have lots of little pits and dents
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've got psoriasis and have had flaky patches for years, and my joints have grumbled before, but nothing has ever swollen up massively and this fast like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: my right hand is basically useless for anything fiddly, I'm limping badly, and I live on my own so I can't safely cook or prepare food with the hand and knee like this

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular arthritis or immune tablets; I only took some paracetamol for this and it did absolutely nothing

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is managing this flare on her own; with the dominant hand and the knee affected she cannot safely prepare food, so there is a self-care / safety concern

objective_data_offered.value: the whole right index finger is uniformly swollen from the knuckle to the tip like a sausage, a dusky purplish-red colour, and I can't bend it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance visible on video; no examination or measurement of the joint possible remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the fingernails on that hand have lots of tiny pits and dents in them
the left knee looks visibly swollen and puffy like it's full of fluid, and it feels warm and tight; I can't fully bend it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: swelling and warmth are patient-observed; a fluctuant effusion cannot be confirmed without hands-on examination

objective_data_offered.value: I feel a bit warm and feverish but I'm not shivering or shaking; I haven't taken a proper temperature
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported feeling of warmth; no thermometer reading offered

objective_data_offered.value: I'm not shaking or having teeth-chattering chills, my heart doesn't feel like it's racing, and I'm not short of breath — just exhausted and in pain
I'm limping badly on the left leg and my right hand is useless for anything fiddly; I can't safely cook for myself
